findings.title: Future deliveries are now refund-eligible
findings.summary: Removing the `elapsedMs >= 0` guard makes any `deliveredAt` timestamp in the future pass the refund window check, because negative elapsed values are always `<= REFUND_WINDOW_MS`. This approves refunds for orders that have not been delivered yet, an invalid customer/order state.
findings.reproduction: Call `isRefundEligible({ deliveredAt: "2026-08-01T00:00:00.000Z", now: "2026-07-11T00:00:00.000Z" })`. The elapsed value is `-1814400000` ms, so the changed line returns `true` even though the delivery timestamp is 21 days in the future.
